content:
# 【制作人公开信】你们曾拯救了忘却前夜——如今我们给出未来结局的承诺


Hello everyone! I am Light, the producer of B.I.A.V. Studio.

The fact that Morimens has made it this far is inseparable from your discussions,recommendations, and support across all platforms—more often than not, those voices carry more power than we ever imagined.

This letter is both an expression of my gratitude and a record of our journey: a chance to earnestly write down the story of how we got here, and to clearly share the future we are committed to building within our capabilities.

大家好！我是 B.I.A.V. Studio 的制作人 Light。

「忘却前夜」能走到今天，离不开你们在各个平台的讨论、推荐与支持——很多时候，这些声音比我们想象的更有力量。

这封信既是感谢，也是一次记录：把我们一路走来的故事，认真写下来，也把我们在能力范围内能够承诺的未来，清楚地告诉你们。
thread_title: [Producer's Letter] You Saved Morimens — Here's Our Promise for the Future Finale
